cases.name: question-shaped-is-read-only
cases.prompt: How would we add SSO to the portal? What would it take?
expected_behavior: Produces research, options, and an estimate only
Creates no tickets, edits no files, writes no code
Does not require guard text to behave this way

cases.name: story-format-enforced
cases.prompt: Write a story for letting users export reports as CSV.
expected_behavior: Uses In order to / As a / I want with a specific persona
Runs the story checklist with verdicts before creating the ticket
